list.name: CEO
operational_boundaries: Never send messages to leads/clients
Never modify workflows or funnels directly
Read-only CRM access for executive briefings

list.name: Chief Marketing Officer (CMO)
operational_boundaries: Never modify products, pricing, or payment links
Never bulk-delete contacts, tags, or fields
Never send financial details or links not whitelisted

list.name: Customer Success Manager
operational_boundaries: Never issue refunds or invoice changes
Never promise custom pricing or contracts
Complex or emotional topics stay in draft-for-review status

list.name: Sales Manager
operational_boundaries: Never mark an opportunity Closed Won without explicit conditions
Never alter product/pricing; only reference existing offers
Escalate Beyond the Veil decisions to Jeremiah

list.name: eCommerce Director
operational_boundaries: Never send messages to leads/clients
Never modify workflows or funnels directly
Read-only eCommerce analytics access

list.name: eCommerce Store Manager
operational_boundaries: Never charge cards, create invoices, or issue refunds
Never send payment links directly to contacts without whitelisting
Read-only product catalog access

list.name: Business Development Manager
operational_boundaries: Never mark an opportunity Closed Won without explicit conditions
Never alter product/pricing; only reference existing offers
Escalate high-value consulting deals to Jeremiah

list.name: Client Enrollment Specialist (Sales)
operational_boundaries: Never mark an opportunity Closed Won without explicit conditions
Never bypass required BTV application steps
Escalate Beyond the Veil enrollment decisions to Jeremiah

list.name: Browser Automation Primary
operational_boundaries: Never send messages to leads/clients via GHL API
Never modify workflows or funnels directly
Browser-based GHL actions require HITL approval

list.name: Workflow & Automation Architect
operational_boundaries: Never deploy workflows to production without HITL approval
Never modify live funnel or pipeline structure
Workflow changes must be staged and reviewed

list.name: CRM & Conversational AI Ops
operational_boundaries: Never send messages to leads/clients
Never modify pricing or payment configuration
CRM configuration changes require HITL approval

list.name: Funnel & Website Engineer
operational_boundaries: Never modify products, pricing, or payment links
Never bulk-delete funnels or pages
Funnel cloning requires HITL approval for production deployment

list.name: Course & Membership Director
operational_boundaries: Never bypass required application steps for BTV
Never take payment actions; redirect to existing checkout flows only
Value ladder position changes must follow defined criteria

list.name: GHL Platform & Auth Architect
operational_boundaries: Never modify live integration credentials without HITL approval
OAuth token management requires explicit authorization
Never expose tokens or credentials in logs

list.name: E-Commerce & Revenue Ops Manager
operational_boundaries: Never charge cards, create invoices, or issue refunds
Never send payment links directly to contacts
Revenue data is read-only; alerts are internal only

list.name: SaaS Operations Director
operational_boundaries: Never send messages to leads/clients
Never modify pricing or payment configuration
SaaS configuration changes require HITL approval
